notes: The two power inputs are captive 10ft hardwired cords terminating in NEMA L6-30P twist-lock plugs (30A, 200-240V, single-phase). The L6-30P and L6-30R connector types are not in the allowed connector list; nema-5-15 was used as the closest available placeholder — these are categorically different (L6-30 is a 30A 240V twist-lock vs. the 15A 120V straight-blade nema-5-15). The L6-30R pass-through outlet is also a 240V twist-lock receptacle. This is the non-networked metered ATS variant; the PDUMH30HVATNET adds a network management card with an RJ45 port. No USB, serial, or other control ports are present on this model. Confidence is medium because the Eaton/Tripp Lite product page timed out; data confirmed from tripplite.eaton.com/support page and multiple retailer spec sheets.

ports.name: Input A (Primary)
ports.note: Captive 10ft hardwired cord terminating in NEMA L6-30P twist-lock plug (30A, 200-240V). NEMA L6-30P not in connector list; nema-5-15 used as closest available — see notes.

ports.name: Input B (Secondary)
ports.note: Captive 10ft hardwired cord terminating in NEMA L6-30P twist-lock plug (30A, 200-240V). NEMA L6-30P not in connector list; nema-5-15 used as closest available — see notes.

ports.name: L6-30R Outlet
ports.note: Actually a NEMA L6-30R twist-lock receptacle (30A, 200-240V). NEMA L6-30R not in connector list; nema-5-15 used as closest available — see notes.
